privacy_policy:
Privacy Policy

iComply Supplys is a trading name of iComply Property Services ("we", "us", "our"). Registered trading address: 17 Woodlands Park Road, Offerton, Stockport SK2 5DE. Telephone: 07517 806082. Email: icomplypropertyservices@gmail.com.

This policy explains how we collect, use and protect personal data when you shop with us online, open a trade account, or contact us about fire detection, emergency lighting, electrical and related trade equipment. We process personal data in accordance with the UK General Data Protection Regulation (UK GDPR) and the Data Protection Act 2018.

1. Data we collect

  • Identity & contact data: name, company name, job title, billing and delivery addresses, email address, telephone number.
  • Account data: trade account details, purchase history, order notes, VAT number (where provided).
  • Transaction data: products ordered, payment status, invoices and delivery records.
  • Technical data: IP address, browser type, device information and cookies used to operate our Shopify storefront.
  • Communications: emails, phone enquiries and support messages relating to orders or technical product advice.

2. How we use your data

  • To process and fulfil orders (B2B and B2C), arrange delivery across the UK mainland, and provide after-sales support.
  • To set up and manage trade accounts, credit applications (where offered) and account pricing.
  • To send order confirmations, shipping updates and essential service communications.
  • To respond to product compatibility, stock and technical enquiries for fire and electrical equipment.
  • To meet legal, accounting and tax obligations (including VAT records).
  • To improve our website, prevent fraud and protect our systems.

3. Legal bases

We rely on: (a) performance of a contract with you; (b) our legitimate interests in operating a trade supply business and improving our services; (c) compliance with legal obligations; and (d) consent where required (for example certain marketing emails).

4. Sharing your data

We may share personal data with: payment processors; courier and logistics partners for UK mainland delivery; Shopify and related hosting/e-commerce tools; professional advisers (accountants, insurers); and authorities where required by law. We do not sell your personal data.

5. International transfers

Some service providers (including Shopify) may process data outside the UK. Where this occurs, appropriate safeguards are used in line with UK data protection law.

6. Retention

We keep order and invoice records for as long as needed for accounting, warranty support and legal requirements (typically up to 6 years for business records). Account and enquiry data is retained while the relationship is active and for a reasonable period afterwards.

7. Your rights

You may request access, rectification, erasure, restriction, data portability, and object to certain processing. You may also withdraw consent where processing is based on consent. Contact us using the details above. You have the right to complain to the Information Commissioner’s Office (ICO) at ico.org.uk.

8. Cookies

Our online store uses essential cookies to enable checkout and account functions, and may use analytics cookies to understand site performance. You can control non-essential cookies via your browser or any cookie banner presented on the site.

9. Security

We take appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect personal data. Payment card details are handled by our payment providers and are not stored on our own servers.

10. Contact

For privacy requests: icomplypropertyservices@gmail.com or write to iComply Property Services, 17 Woodlands Park Road, Offerton, Stockport SK2 5DE.

Last updated: July 2026.
refund_policy:
Returns & Refund Policy

iComply Supplys / iComply Property Services, 17 Woodlands Park Road, Offerton, Stockport SK2 5DE. Tel: 07517 806082. Email: icomplypropertyservices@gmail.com.

This policy applies to goods purchased from our Shopify store (B2C retail customers and B2B trade customers). Special or non-standard trade terms may apply where agreed in writing on a trade account order.

1. Consumer right to cancel (distance selling)

If you buy as a consumer (not for business use), you have 14 days from the day after you receive the goods to cancel under the Consumer Contracts Regulations. You must notify us within that period by email to icomplypropertyservices@gmail.com quoting your order number.

2. Returns window (all customers)

We accept returns of unused, unopened and resaleable stock within 14 days of delivery, provided:

  • Items are in original packaging with all labels, manuals and accessories;
  • Items have not been installed, programmed, site-tested, painted or modified;
  • Fire system devices (panels, detectors, modules, power supplies, etc.) show no signs of use or damage;
  • You obtain a Returns Authorisation (RA) from us before sending goods back.

3. Non-returnable items

  • Goods cut to length (e.g. fire cable sold by the metre) once supplied;
  • Special-order, non-stock or made-to-order items unless faulty;
  • Opened sealed battery packs or power products where seal integrity affects safety/warranty;
  • Software licences, downloadable content or personalised goods;
  • Items returned without an RA or outside the 14-day window (except faulty goods).

4. Faulty, damaged or incorrect goods

Please inspect deliveries on arrival. Report shortages, transit damage or incorrect items within 48 hours of delivery with photos and your order number. Faulty goods are covered by your statutory rights and any manufacturer warranty. We will repair, replace or refund as appropriate after assessment.

5. How to return

  1. Email us for an RA reference and return address instructions.
  2. Pack goods securely in original packaging where possible.
  3. Include your order number, RA reference and contact details.
  4. Return shipping for change-of-mind returns is the customer’s responsibility unless we have sent the wrong item or the goods are faulty.

6. Refunds

Once we receive and inspect returned goods, approved refunds are processed to the original payment method within 14 days. Original outbound shipping charges are only refunded where required by law (e.g. faulty/incorrect goods) or at our discretion. We may deduct an amount for diminished value if consumer goods show more than reasonable handling.

7. Trade account returns

Trade customers must still obtain an RA. Restocking charges may apply to non-faulty returns of stocked lines (typically up to 20% where packaging is opened or handling costs are incurred). Credit notes are issued to the trade account unless otherwise agreed. Contract, project and special-order stock is non-returnable unless faulty.

8. Statutory rights

Nothing in this policy affects your statutory rights under the Consumer Rights Act 2015 or other applicable UK law.

Last updated: July 2026.
shipping_policy:
Shipping Policy

iComply Supplys / iComply Property Services, 17 Woodlands Park Road, Offerton, Stockport SK2 5DE. Tel: 07517 806082. Email: icomplypropertyservices@gmail.com.

1. Delivery area

We ship to UK mainland addresses (England, Wales and mainland Scotland). Orders to Northern Ireland, Scottish Highlands & Islands, Isle of Man, Channel Islands and other non-mainland locations may be available on request with a custom quote — please contact us before ordering.

2. Processing times

In-stock orders placed before the stated cut-off (typically weekday mornings) are usually dispatched the same or next working day. Stock status is shown on product pages where available. Special-order fire equipment may take longer; we will advise estimated lead times for trade project orders.

3. Shipping options (UK mainland)

  • Collection: Free collection by arrangement from our Stockport area (Offerton) — contact us to book a slot and confirm stock is ready.
  • Standard delivery: Economy tracked service for non-urgent parcels and small consignments (typically 2–4 working days after dispatch).
  • Express delivery: Next working day tracked service when ordered before cut-off and stock is available (mainland postcodes only; remote areas may take longer).

Live rates are calculated at checkout based on weight, dimensions and destination. Large panels, cable drums and bulk trade orders may ship on pallet or multi-parcel services; we will contact you if a surcharge or alternative method is required.

4. Order tracking

Tracking details are emailed when the order ships. Please ensure your contact telephone number is correct for courier updates and access issues.

5. Delivery issues

If a parcel is marked delivered but not received, contact us within 48 hours so we can raise a courier investigation. Risk passes in accordance with applicable law and the shipping method selected; please report visible transit damage on receipt.

6. Trade account shipping

Approved trade accounts may request consolidated despatch, site deliveries, timed slots or account-invoiced carriage. Minimum order values for free carriage (where offered) will be confirmed on your trade terms. Site deliveries require a clear address, contact name and phone number; waiting time or failed delivery charges from carriers may be recharged.

7. Export

We primarily supply the UK market. Export enquiries may be considered case by case; duties, taxes and compliance for destination countries remain the buyer’s responsibility unless agreed otherwise in writing.

Last updated: July 2026.
terms_of_service:
Terms of Service

These Terms govern use of the iComply Supplys online store and purchases from iComply Property Services ("we", "us", "our"), 17 Woodlands Park Road, Offerton, Stockport SK2 5DE. Tel: 07517 806082. Email: icomplypropertyservices@gmail.com.

By placing an order or creating an account you agree to these Terms. Please also read our Privacy, Shipping and Returns policies.

1. Who we sell to

We supply fire detection equipment, emergency lighting products, electrical trade goods and related accessories to both trade (B2B) and retail (B2C) customers in the United Kingdom. Some products are intended for installation by competent persons in accordance with applicable British Standards (including BS 5839 series for fire detection and BS 5266 for emergency lighting where relevant).

2. Accounts & trade terms

  • You must provide accurate company and contact information.
  • Trade accounts are subject to approval. We may request company details, VAT number and trade references.
  • Unless credit terms are expressly agreed in writing, payment is due at checkout or on pro-forma invoice before despatch.
  • Where credit is granted, payment is due within the stated period (e.g. 30 days from invoice). We may suspend supply or charge interest on overdue sums at the statutory rate.
  • Trade prices, discounts and free-carriage thresholds are discretionary and may change without notice except for accepted orders.

3. Orders & contract formation

Product listings are invitations to treat. A contract is formed when we send an order confirmation or despatch the goods (whichever occurs first). We may cancel or refuse orders for pricing errors, stock unavailability, suspected fraud, or where supply would breach law or manufacturer restrictions.

4. Pricing & VAT

Prices are in GBP. VAT is applied at the prevailing UK rate unless a valid zero/exempt treatment applies. We reserve the right to correct obvious pricing errors. Shipping costs are shown at checkout or on quotation.

5. Product information & suitability

Descriptions, images and specifications are provided in good faith from manufacturer data. It is the buyer’s responsibility to select products suitable for the application, design and applicable standards. We can provide trade guidance but do not replace a competent fire system designer, installer or responsible person under fire safety law. Installation, commissioning and certification are separate services and only included when expressly purchased or contracted.

6. Delivery

Delivery is primarily to UK mainland addresses as set out in our Shipping Policy. Dates are estimates. Title to goods passes on full payment; risk passes on delivery to the carrier or to you, as applicable under the chosen shipping method and UK law.

7. Returns

Returns of unused goods within 14 days and handling of faulty goods are governed by our Returns & Refund Policy and your statutory rights.

8. Warranty

Manufacturer warranties apply to branded equipment subject to correct storage, installation and use. Our liability for defective goods supplied to consumers is as required by the Consumer Rights Act 2015. For business customers, to the fullest extent permitted by law, we will at our option repair, replace or refund defective goods notified within a reasonable time, and exclude other warranties implied by statute.

9. Limitation of liability

Nothing in these Terms limits liability for death or personal injury caused by negligence, fraud, or any other liability that cannot be limited by law. Subject to that, we are not liable for loss of profit, business interruption, loss of data, or indirect/consequential loss. For business customers our total liability for any order is limited to the price paid for the goods giving rise to the claim.

10. Intellectual property

Website content, branding and materials remain our property or that of our licensors. You may not copy or reuse them without permission.

11. Acceptable use

You must not misuse the site, attempt unauthorised access, scrape content in bulk, or place orders with false details.

12. Governing law

These Terms are governed by the laws of England and Wales. Courts of England and Wales have exclusive jurisdiction, without prejudice to mandatory consumer protections in your place of residence if you are a consumer.

13. Contact

iComply Property Services / iComply Supplys, 17 Woodlands Park Road, Offerton, Stockport SK2 5DE. Email: icomplypropertyservices@gmail.com. Phone: 07517 806082.

Last updated: July 2026.
